mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, original_price, category_id, category_name, image, images, sales, status, is_hot, is_new, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category_id IN ( SELECT id FROM product_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} OR parent_id = #{categoryId} )

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.original_price, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.image, p.images, p.sales, p.status, p.is_hot, p.is_new, p.create_time, COALESCE(i.stock, 0) as stock FROM product p LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.item_id = p.id AND i.type = 'product' WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, original_price, category_id, category_name, image, status, is_hot, is_new) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{image}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{isNew})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET avg_rating = #{avgRating}, comment_count = #{commentCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalProducts, COALESCE(SUM(sales), 0) as totalSales, COALESCE(SUM(price * sales), 0) as totalRevenue, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_rating), 1), 0) as avgRating FROM product WHERE status = 1

SELECT pc.name as name, COUNT(p.id) as value FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND pc.name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pc.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, name, sales, price, image FROM product WHERE status = 1 AND sales > 0 ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN price < 50 THEN '0-50元' WHEN price >= 50 AND price < 100 THEN '50-100元' WHEN price >= 100 AND price < 200 THEN '100-200元' WHEN price >= 200 AND price < 500 THEN '200-500元' ELSE '500元以上' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM product WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY CASE WHEN price < 50 THEN '0-50元' WHEN price >= 50 AND price < 100 THEN '50-100元' WHEN price >= 100 AND price < 200 THEN '100-200元' WHEN price >= 200 AND price < 500 THEN '200-500元' ELSE '500元以上' END ORDER BY MIN(price)
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as onShelf, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as offShelf FROM product
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET sales = sales + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
